• Creates a pixel‑art mining game with mobile D‑pad, action buttons, and a full UI overlay.
  • Implements procedural map generation, AOE mining, explosives, and a shop system for upgrades and consumables.
  • Handles multiplayer via MQTT, includes admin host election, cloud sync, and configurable settings.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy('drill')

This HTML page defines a canvas‑based mining game with custom shaders, a beveled UI style, and responsive mobile controls. It includes sound synthesis, procedural terrain, player stats, a shop, and multiplayer synchronization. Settings, autosave, and cloud sync are configurable through the built‑in menu.
